summary: Frontend testing completed for Settings and Admin page restructuring. All 11 test features passed. Settings page now has 4 tabs (Profile, Notifications, Calendar, AI). Admin page has 2 tabs (Email Configuration, User Management). Navigation dropdown shows 'Admin' link for admin users (replaces 'Manage Users'). Old /admin/users route correctly redirects to landing page.
passed_tests: Settings page: 4 tabs visible (Profile, Notifications, Calendar, AI) - data-testid='settings-tabs' found
Settings > Profile tab: shows profile info (name, email, role, member since) and change password form
Settings > Notifications tab: shows daily reminders toggle with data-testid='daily-reminders-switch'
Settings > Calendar tab: shows Google Calendar sync settings (lazy loaded when tab clicked)
Settings > AI tab: renamed to 'AI Settings', shows OpenAI key config (lazy loaded when tab clicked)
Admin page: accessible at /admin with data-testid='admin-page'
Admin page: 2 tabs visible (Email Configuration, User Management) - data-testid='admin-tabs' found
Admin > Email Configuration tab: shows test email button with data-testid='send-test-email-button'
Admin > User Management tab: shows user table with create button (lazy loaded when tab clicked)
Navigation dropdown: 'Admin' link with data-testid='admin-link' shown for admin users (replaces 'Manage Users')
Old /admin/users route correctly redirects to landing page (catch-all route)
ProtectedRoute adminOnly prop: non-admin users redirect to /dashboard when accessing /admin
critical_code_review_comments: Settings page correctly implements Tabs component with 4 tabs and lazy loading for Calendar and AI tabs
AdminPage correctly implements 2 tabs with lazy loading for User Management tab
Layout.jsx correctly updated - 'Manage Users' link replaced with 'Admin' link for admin users
App.js correctly updated - route changed from /admin/users to /admin with adminOnly protection
ProtectedRoute correctly handles adminOnly prop - non-admin users redirected to /dashboard
AdminUsersPage.jsx file still exists but is no longer imported/routed (can be deleted in cleanup)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings and Admin page restructuring complete. Settings has 4 tabs: Profile, Notifications, Calendar (lazy), AI (lazy). Admin has 2 tabs: Email Configuration, User Management (lazy). Key test IDs: settings-page, settings-tabs, tab-profile, tab-notifications, tab-calendar, tab-ai, admin-page, admin-tabs, admin-tab-email, admin-tab-users, admin-link, send-test-email-button, create-user-button, daily-reminders-switch, openai-api-key, google-client-id. Old AdminUsersPage.jsx still exists but not imported/routed.
